languages.text: "В таком случае я обращусь к твоему коллеге, вивисектору. Обычно он посговорчивее тебя".

traits.locale_text: "В таком случае я обращусь к твоему коллеге, вивисектору. Обычно он посговорчивее тебя".

languages.text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."
languages.original_text: "В таком случае я обращусь к твоему коллеге, вивисектору. Обычно он посговорчивее тебя".

traits.locale_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."
"In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."
"In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

languages.text: 「そうであれば、同僚の解剖師に依頼しよう。彼はあなたより融通が利く傾向がある」
languages.original_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

traits.locale_text: 「そうであれば、同僚の解剖師に依頼しましょう。彼はあなたより融通が利く傾向があります。」

languages.text: "O hâlde Dirikesimci meslektaşına soracağım. Uzlaşmacı olmaya daha meyilli."
languages.original_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

traits.locale_text: "O hâlde Dirikesimci meslektaşına soracağım. Uzlaşmacı olmaya daha meyilli."

languages.text: «En ese caso, preguntaré a su colega el vivisector. Tiende a ser más servicial que usted».
languages.original_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

traits.locale_text: «En ese caso, preguntaré a su colega el vivisector. Tiende a ser más servicial que usted».

languages.text: “既然如此，那我去问你的那位解剖者同事吧。他看起来比你更通情达理。”
languages.original_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

traits.locale_text: “既然如此，那我去问你的那位解剖者同事吧。他看起来比你更通情达理。”

languages.text: « Dans ce cas, je vais m'adresser à votre collègue, le vivisecteur. Il se montre généralement plus conciliant que vous. »
languages.original_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

traits.locale_text: « Dans ce cas, je vais m'adresser à votre collègue, le vivisecteur. Il se montre généralement plus conciliant que vous. »

languages.text: "In dem Fall frage ich Euren Kollegen, den Vivisektor. Er ist meist entgegenkommender als Ihr."
languages.original_text: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."

traits.locale_text: "In dem Fall frage ich Euren Kollegen, den Vivisektor. Er ist meist entgegenkommender als Ihr."
